summary: Iteration 41: Push Notification Infrastructure - All tests passed. Backend 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend all features verified. Device registration/unregistration endpoints working, push service gracefully degrades without Firebase credentials (dry-run mode), existing attendance endpoints still work.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: push.py: Graceful degradation implemented - logs warning when FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_PATH not set, returns None/0 for send operations
push.py: send_push_multi returns (success_count, failure_count, failed_tokens) tuple for proper error handling
devices.py: Upsert pattern correctly implemented - updates existing token if same token sent again
devices.py: Device unregistration sets is_active=False (soft delete) rather than hard delete
notifications.py: check-long-shifts now imports and calls send_push_multi for native push (dry-run in current config)
server.py: Background task _long_shift_checker also sends push notifications when creating nudges
AuthContext.js: initPushNotifications called after successful login, teardownPushNotifications on logout
push.js: Gracefully handles browser environment - logs 'Using in-app notifications only' when not in Capacitor
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified push notification infrastructure: (1) POST /api/devices/register stores device token with staff_id, username, restaurant_id - upserts if same token. (2) DELETE /api/devices/unregister marks device as inactive (soft delete). (3) Push service in push.py initializes without crash when FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_PATH not set - logs warning and operates in dry-run mode. (4) POST /api/notifications/check-long-shifts creates notifications AND attempts push (dry-run). (5) All existing attendance endpoints (clock-me, my-status, my-summary) still work. (6) Frontend push.js gracefully handles browser environment (no Capacitor). (7) AuthContext.js calls initPushNotifications on login, teardownPushNotifications on logout.

device_register_updates_existing.evidence: Second POST with same token returns 200 - upsert pattern works

device_register_requires_token.evidence: POST with empty token returns 400 'Token is required'

push_service_no_crash_without_credential.evidence: Backend running and responding - push.py initialized without crash

check_long_shifts_attempts_push.evidence: POST /api/notifications/check-long-shifts returns 200 with 'Checked X long shifts'

admin_dashboard_renders.evidence: Dashboard loads with Today's Revenue widget, no 7-day chart

notification_bell_works.evidence: Notification bell visible in Heva Ops header, dropdown opens on click

clock_in_page_renders.evidence: Clock In page shows one-tap button with current time and status

no_javascript_errors.evidence: No JS errors detected during testing

mocked_apis_list: Firebase Cloud Messaging is in dry-run mode (FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_PATH not set)
